meta.name: viewport
meta.title: Talking About Tumors with Ryann and Ryan

meta.name: description
meta.content: A medical oncology podcast for residents, fellows, and oncology-interested clinicians.
Talking About Tumors with Ryann and Ryan
A medical oncology podcast for residents, fellows, and oncology-interested clinicians.

div.h1: Talking About Tumors with Ryann and Ryan
div.p: Designed for residents and fellows, this podcast provides an overview of the clinical practice and evidence behind management of individual tumor sites.

img.alt: Talking About Tumors with Ryann and Ryan logo

div.h2: Browse by chapter and disease site
div.p: Each chapter page groups episodes by the podcast’s disease-site curriculum. Episode cards include audio players, collapsible show notes, and references with DOI hyperlinks.

article.p: Colon, gastroesophageal, pancreatic, biliary, rectal, anal, ampullary, and related GI oncology topics.
Early breast cancer, endocrine therapy, HER2-positive disease, triple-negative breast cancer, hereditary risk, and metastatic management.
Immune checkpoint inhibitors, melanoma, lung cancer, mesothelioma, and head and neck malignancies.
Prostate, bladder, urothelial, renal cell, and testicular cancer topics.
Hepatocellular carcinoma, neuroendocrine tumors, glioblastoma, interviews, and ongoing topics.

div.p: Medical oncologist and Assistant Professor of Medicine, UMass Chan Medical School

Ryan practices in Worcester, Massachusetts. He has an interest in all solid tumor sites, medical education, clinical research in immunotherapy, and the role of large language models in patient communication. His clinical practice focuses on GI, hepatobiliary, and thoracic malignancies.
Hematology/oncology provider and Assistant Professor of Medicine, UMass Chan Medical School
Ryann practices in Worcester, Massachusetts. Her clinical practice focuses on breast cancer management. She is interested in medical education and quality in care delivery.

div.h2: Use the show as a companion to oncology training.
div.p: Subscribe through your preferred podcast platform, listen through Buzzsprout, suggest a topic, or invite a host to speak.

p.strong: Talking About Tumors with Ryann and Ryan

img.p: Educational podcast content for trainees and clinicians interested in oncology.

div.p: Disclaimer: Talking About Tumors with Ryan and Ryann is not medical advice. Opinions are those of the speakers. The podcast is intended as an introduction to medical oncology for post-graduate trainees and other clinicians interested in the topic.
